command: echo '=== All terminal log entries after 22:20 ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -E '22:2[0-9]|22:3[0-9]' "$TLOG" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\0' | grep -i 'expert\|loaded\|autotrading\|account\|connecting\|connected\|error\|PropFirm' | head -30 && echo '=== Full terminal log last 40 lines ===' && tail -40 "$TLOG" 2>&1 | tr -d '\0' && echo '=== EA logs today ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/20260226.log' 2>&1 && echo '=== Check if EA is in Experts panel ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/' -name '*.ex5' -ls 2>&1 | grep -i prop && echo '=== MT5 profile charts ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/config/charts/' -name '*.chr' -ls 2>/dev/null | head -5
